name: ticket-to-pr-workflow
description: Codex App-native ticket-to-PR workflow suite for local and private marketplaces.

interface.shortDescription: Critique plans, implement safely, verify, and prepare ticket-scoped PRs.
interface.longDescription: A Codex App-native parent workflow that orchestrates Jira intake, implementation planning and critique, approval-gated code work, risk-aware verification, Storybook and browser gates, and PR reporting.
